# Surya Raj - Project Archives

This is the project archive of Surya Raj.
URL: https://archive.suryaraj.com/

## About
This website serves as a repository for past, deprecated, or discontinued projects. It uses a modern retro terminal theme. It's essentially a catalog of older codebases and web experiments that Surya wants to preserve.

## Projects

### 1. Personal Website (2020)
- **URL**: https://archive.suryaraj.com/personal-website-2020/
- **Technologies**: Angular, TypeScript, SCSS
- **Status**: Archived
- **Year**: 2020
- **Description**: Personal website built with Angular.

### 2. Smart Farming
- **URL**: https://archive.suryaraj.com/SmartFarming/
- **Technologies**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, EDGE AI, IoT
- **Status**: Deprecated
- **Year**: 2022
- **Description**: Precision smart agriculture using EDGE AI and Intelligence Cloud.

### 3. Personal Website (2025)
- **URL**: https://archive.suryaraj.com/personal-website-2025/
- **Technologies**: Angular, SSR, TypeScript
- **Status**: Archived
- **Year**: 2025
- **Description**: Modern portfolio with Angular SSR and Prerendering.

## Main Site
Surya Raj's main website is available at: https://suryaraj.com
